title: entada goetzei subsp. goetzei
intro: Entada goetzei subsp. goetzei, also known as the Goetze's Entada, is a species of flowering plant in the pea family (Fabaceae). This plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional medicine, where it has been used to treat various health conditions such as fever, rheumatism, and digestive issues. The health benefits of Entada goetzei subsp. goetzei include its anti-inflammatory and antipyretic properties, which help to reduce inflammation and fever, as well as its ability to act as a diuretic, promoting urine production and helping to remove toxins from the body. Herbal preparations of Entada goetzei subsp. goetzei can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and are often used in combination with other herbs to enhance their medicinal properties.
